sous_titres.text: In 6th grade, Nora was told to write an essay as if she was an object.
She knew at once she'd be their house.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0010_time_150.00s-165.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: She described how its belly shook as she and her sister ran downstairs
and out the back door.
That it saw them take the shortcut through the fence and onto the road,

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0011_time_165.00s-180.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: where the house no longer could see them.
She wondered if the house liked to be empty and light,

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0012_time_180.00s-195.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: or full and heavy.
If the floors liked being trod on.
If the walls were ticklish.
If it ever felt pain.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0013_time_195.00s-210.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: And she thought that yes, it probably liked to be full.
Before them, other people and pets

sous_titres.text: had lived their moments in time there.
Her great-great-grandfather died in the room where her grandmother was born,

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0015_time_225.00s-240.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Their father said the house had a flaw, discovered right after it was finished

sous_titres.text: only in very slow motion, and that her family's time there

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0017_time_255.00s-270.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: When she read it later, she saw that she hadn't used the word "quarrel",

sous_titres.text: But what the house disliked more than noise, was silence.

sous_titres.text: The noise her parents made, went away.

sous_titres.text: - Hi. - Hi.
Sorry for showing up like this, but why don't you answer my calls?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0436_time_6540.00s-6555.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I'm sorry.
- Are you okay? - Mm.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0437_time_6555.00s-6570.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: You have to answer the phone.
You know how anxious I get when you don't.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0438_time_6570.00s-6585.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: What's going on? Are you sick?
No.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0439_time_6585.00s-6600.00s.mp4
analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0440_time_6600.00s-6615.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I had a row with dad yesterday.
I was furious. He wants to put Erik in the film.
I don't want that.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0441_time_6615.00s-6630.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: But then I read the script.
And it was so great. Not at all what I imagined.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0442_time_6630.00s-6645.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Right. I know you don't want anything to do with it.
But I still want you to read it.
Because I sense it's about you.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0443_time_6645.00s-6660.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Or...
I think he wrote it for you. It's not about his mother.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0444_time_6660.00s-6675.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Well.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0445_time_6675.00s-6690.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Could you read this bit for me?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0446_time_6690.00s-6705.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Don't mind that it's like...
Well, a bit overwritten.
Just read it.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0447_time_6705.00s-6720.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: "You know, I don't believe in God at all."
"We came from a home where all that was irrelevant."

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0448_time_6720.00s-6735.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: "We weren't baptised. My sister and I had a civil confirmation just for the money."
"Then I had this kind of crisis."
"I was alone in the house again, lying in bed, crying."

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0449_time_6735.00s-6750.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: "I know everyone lies in bed crying at some point, but..."
"Someone said praying isn't really talking to God."
"It's acknowledging despair."
"To throw yourself on the ground because that's all you can do."

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0450_time_6750.00s-6765.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: "Not unlike heartbreak:"
"'Call me. Please change your mind.'"
"'Take me back.'"
"There I was. I'd ruined everything."

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0451_time_6765.00s-6780.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: "I was alone, lying there, crying."
"And then, for the first time,"
"I sat down and prayed."
"It's hard to explain."
"I don't know who I prayed to, but I said it out loud."

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0452_time_6780.00s-6795.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: "'Help me.'"
"'I can't do this.'"
"'I can't do it alone.'"

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0453_time_6795.00s-6810.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: "'I want a home.'"
"'I want a home.'"

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0454_time_6810.00s-6825.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: Did you tell dad about...
- My suicide attempt? - No, of course not.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0460_time_6900.00s-6915.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: I thought the same thing. "How does he know?"
It's mixed up with a lot of things about his mother.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0461_time_6915.00s-6930.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: But in some scenes it's as if he was there when you went through it.
Well, he wasn't.
You were.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0462_time_6930.00s-6945.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: How did it happen?
You turned out fine, and I became fucked up.
That's not true.
Why didn't our childhood ruin you?

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0464_time_6960.00s-6975.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: It hasn't always been easy for me.
But you've managed to make a family.
- A home. - Yeah.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0465_time_6975.00s-6990.00s.mp4

sous_titres.text: There's one major difference in the way we grew up.
I had you.
I know you think you're incapable of caring, but you were there for me.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0466_time_6990.00s-7005.00s.mp4

You washed my hair.

sous_titres.text: Combed it.
Got me to school.
I felt safe.

intervalles.video_path: analyse\videos\Sentimental Value 2025 1080p WEB-DL HEVC x265-RMTeam  [ UIndex.org ]\interval_0470_time_7050.00s-7065.00s.mp4
